title: Fundamentals of Rocket Propulsion
summary: Thrust is momentum exchange. Understand the rocket equation, propellant mass fraction, and why Isp and mass ratio dominate mission capability.

keyEquations.label: Tsiolkovsky Rocket Equation
keyEquations.description: Ideal velocity change from propellant expenditure

objectives: Derive thrust from first principles (control volume)
Connect specific impulse to effective exhaust velocity
Calculate required mass ratio for a given Δv
